data.title: VOID opens at the Reykjavik Biennale
data.content:
Our immersive installation VOID is now open to the public at the Reykjavik Biennale. The piece occupies a 200 square metre space within the Harpa Concert Hall and will run until December 15.

Visiting hours are 10:00–18:00 daily. Entry is free with a Biennale pass. We recommend visiting in the evening hours when natural light is low — the experience transforms after dark.
data.excerpt: Our immersive installation VOID is now live at Harpa Concert Hall as part of the 2024 Reykjavik Biennale.
